data_description.sm_id: The smId of your Solarmanager system from the cloud interface.
data_description.api_key: Cloud API Key for modern authentication (recommended). Found in profile settings under "Cloud API Keys". Create the token without an expiry date, enable all four scopes (read, write, externalOverride:read, externalOverride:write), do NOT enable "Allow renewal". Important: The token is only visible immediately after creation — copy it right away!

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Solarmanager
reauth_confirm.description:
Update credentials for system **{sm_id}**.

Recommended: API Key from profile settings → "Cloud API Keys". No expiry date, all four scopes (read, write, externalOverride:read, externalOverride:write), do NOT enable "Allow renewal". The token is only visible immediately after creation — copy it right away!

Note: If the API Key section is not yet visible, contact support — the feature is enabled on request.

error.auth: Invalid credentials or API Key. Please check and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Solarmanager Cloud.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Please check the logs.

abort.already_configured: This Solarmanager system is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful. The integration will reload.

data_description.scan_interval: How often the API is polled. Recommended: 10 seconds.
